Three open security/infosec/appsec CFPs in BE/FR/NL/DE as of Apr 30, 2026: BruCON 0x12 (Mechelen, closes today 23:59 CEST), OWASP AppSec Days France 2026 (Paris, closes May 7), and 24th escar Europe (Bonn, closes May 10 — automotive-only). The artifact also lists 11 recently-closed CFPs and a watch list of upcoming ones, with 25 cited sources in `citations.jsonl`.
